name: SELECTIS HEALTH, INC.
summary: Selectis Health, Inc. owns and operates Assisted Living Facilities (ALFs), Independent Living Facilities (ILFs), and Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs) across the South and Southeastern United States through wholly-owned subsidiaries. The Company shifted from a REIT leasing model to an owner-operator model in 2019. As of December 31, 2024, it operates nine healthcare facilities offering post-acute/skilled nursing, senior housing, and independent living services, with revenues primarily from Medicare, Medicaid, and private-pay sources.

products.name: Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNF)
products.description: Restorative, rehabilitative, and custodial nursing care including therapy, wound care, oncology, and pharmaceutical services.

products.name: Assisted Living Facilities (ALF)
products.description: Licensed personal care facilities offering ADL assistance, meals, transportation, and social activities for seniors.

products.name: Independent Living Facilities (ILF)
products.description: Senior housing with housekeeping, meals, and activities for seniors not requiring daily living assistance.

products.name: Continuing Care Retirement Communities (CCRC)
products.description: Long-term housing and health-related services allowing residents to age in place across care levels.
